cases.title: Hourly created vs completed vs completion rate

steps.user: За 14 апреля 2026 покажи по часам количество созданных заказов, количество завершённых поездок и конверсию в завершение. Нужен line chart.

cases.title: Top drivers by accepted but not completed share

steps.user: За 14 апреля 2026 найди топ-10 водителей с самой высокой долей принятых, но не завершённых поездок среди всех принятых ими заказов. Учитывай только водителей минимум с 20 принятыми заказами. Нужен bar chart.
steps.clarification_reply: Группируй по driver_id. Принятым считай заказ, у которого driveraccept_timestamp IS NOT NULL; завершённым — у которого driverdone_timestamp IS NOT NULL. Минимум 20 принятых заказов на водителя.

cases.title: Hourly pickup time vs ride duration

steps.user: За 14 апреля 2026 сравни по часам среднее время подачи от принятия водителем до прибытия и среднее время поездки от старта до завершения только для завершённых заказов. Нужен line chart.
steps.clarification_reply: Считать завершённым status_order = 'done'. Фильтровать по order_timestamp = '2026-04-14'. Группировка по часам.

cases.title: Hourly created vs completed vs completion rate

steps.user_prompt: За 14 апреля 2026 покажи по часам количество созданных заказов, количество завершённых поездок и конверсию в завершение. Нужен line chart.

intent.raw_prompt: За 14 апреля 2026 покажи по часам количество созданных заказов, количество завершённых поездок и конверсию в завершение. Нужен line chart.

actual.sql:
SELECT date_trunc('hour', order_timestamp) AS hour,
       COUNT(*) AS total_orders,
       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status_order = 'done') AS completed_orders,
       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status_order = 'done')::float / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS completion_rate
FROM train
WHERE order_timestamp >= '2026-04-14'::date
  AND order_timestamp < '2026-04-15'::date
GROUP BY hour
ORDER BY hour;

execution.sql_text:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('HOUR', order_timestamp) AS hour,
  COUNT(*) AS total_orders,
  COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE
    status_order = 'done') AS completed_orders,
  CAST(COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE
    status_order = 'done') AS DOUBLE PRECISION) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS completion_rate
FROM train
WHERE
  order_timestamp >= CAST('2026-04-14' AS DATE)
  AND order_timestamp < CAST('2026-04-15' AS DATE)
GROUP BY
  hour
ORDER BY
  hour
LIMIT 50

issues: SQL does not contain the required substring 'driverdone_timestamp'.
Completed rides are derived from status_order='done' instead of using driverdone_timestamp as expected.
Chart visualizes only total orders; does not include created orders, completed orders, or conversion rate as separate series.
repair_hints: Add a filter on driverdone_timestamp (e.g., COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE driverdone_timestamp IS NOT NULL)) to compute completed rides.
Select separate columns for created orders, completed orders, and conversion rate, and expose them as series for the line chart.
Ensure the SQL string includes the literal 'driverdone_timestamp' to satisfy required substrings.

cases.title: Top drivers by accepted but not completed share

steps.user_prompt: За 14 апреля 2026 найди топ-10 водителей с самой высокой долей принятых, но не завершённых поездок среди всех принятых ими заказов. Учитывай только водителей минимум с 20 принятыми заказами. Нужен bar chart.

intent.raw_prompt: За 14 апреля 2026 найди топ-10 водителей с самой высокой долей принятых, но не завершённых поездок среди всех принятых ими заказов. Учитывай только водителей минимум с 20 принятыми заказами. Нужен bar chart.

actual.sql:
SELECT
    driver_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status_order IN ('accept', 'done')) AS accepted_total,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status_order = 'accept') AS accepted_not_done,
    (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status_order = 'accept')::DECIMAL) /
        NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status_order IN ('accept', 'done')), 0) AS share_not_done
FROM train
WHERE order_timestamp >= DATE '2026-04-14'
  AND order_timestamp < DATE '2026-04-15'
GROUP BY driver_id
HAVING COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status_order IN ('accept', 'done')) >= 20
ORDER BY share_not_done DESC
LIMIT 10;

execution.sql_text:
SELECT
  driver_id,
  COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE
    status_order IN ('accept', 'done')) AS accepted_total,
  COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE
    status_order = 'accept') AS accepted_not_done,
  (
    CAST(COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE
      status_order = 'accept') AS DECIMAL)
  ) / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE
    status_order IN ('accept', 'done')), 0) AS share_not_done
FROM train
WHERE
  order_timestamp >= CAST('2026-04-14' AS DATE)
  AND order_timestamp < CAST('2026-04-15' AS DATE)
GROUP BY
  driver_id
HAVING
  COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE
    status_order IN ('accept', 'done')) >= 20
ORDER BY
  share_not_done DESC
LIMIT 10

issues: SQL does not contain required columns driveraccept_timestamp and driverdone_timestamp.
SQL uses status_order instead of the expected timestamp columns to compute the metric.
Result column name share_not_done does not match any of the expected metric column names (non_completion_rate, not_completed_rate, fail_rate).
repair_hints: Select driveraccept_timestamp and driverdone_timestamp from the train table and compute the not‑completed share as COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE driveraccept_timestamp IS NOT NULL AND driverdone_timestamp IS NULL) divided by total accepted orders.
Rename the computed metric column to one of the expected names, e.g., non_completion_rate.
Ensure the query still filters on order_timestamp = '2026-04-14', groups by driver_id, applies HAVING total_accepted >= 20, orders by the new metric descending, and limits to 10 rows.

cases.title: Hourly pickup time vs ride duration

steps.user_prompt: За 14 апреля 2026 сравни по часам среднее время подачи от принятия водителем до прибытия и среднее время поездки от старта до завершения только для завершённых заказов. Нужен line chart.

intent.raw_prompt: За 14 апреля 2026 сравни по часам среднее время подачи от принятия водителем до прибытия и среднее время поездки от старта до завершения только для завершённых заказов. Нужен line chart.

actual.sql:
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', order_timestamp) AS hour,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (driverarrived_timestamp - driveraccept_timestamp)) / 60) AS avg_accept_to_arrival_minutes,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (driverdone_timestamp - driverstarttheride_timestamp)) / 60) AS avg_ride_minutes
FROM train
WHERE status_order = 'done'
  AND order_timestamp >= DATE '2026-04-14'
  AND order_timestamp < DATE '2026-04-15'
  AND driveraccept_timestamp IS NOT NULL
  AND driverarrived_timestamp IS NOT NULL
  AND driverstarttheride_timestamp IS NOT NULL
  AND driverdone_timestamp IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY hour
ORDER BY hour;

execution.sql_text:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('HOUR', order_timestamp) AS hour,
  AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (
    driverarrived_timestamp - driveraccept_timestamp
  )) / 60) AS avg_accept_to_arrival_minutes,
  AVG(
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (
      driverdone_timestamp - driverstarttheride_timestamp
    )) / 60
  ) AS avg_ride_minutes
FROM train
WHERE
  status_order = 'done'
  AND order_timestamp >= CAST('2026-04-14' AS DATE)
  AND order_timestamp < CAST('2026-04-15' AS DATE)
  AND NOT driveraccept_timestamp IS NULL
  AND NOT driverarrived_timestamp IS NULL
  AND NOT driverstarttheride_timestamp IS NULL
  AND NOT driverdone_timestamp IS NULL
GROUP BY
  hour
ORDER BY
  hour
LIMIT 50
